title: Tournament round policy separation and team aggregate blocked-region implementation

verified_baseline.worktree_and_index: clean before implementation; no untracked files

defects_reproduced.MISSING-UI-015: Verified team competitions rendered the same individual detail composition with no dedicated truthful team-aggregate contract region.
defects_reproduced.NONCONF-UI-022: The round mapper discarded roundfinish, made round status blank, and rejected a real cur_round:null payload; detail selected source-current-or-first while display selected source-current-or-last-or-first.
defects_reproduced.COR-005: A missing detail round was copied into the display URL, so display inherited commentary context instead of independently applying a display policy.
defects_reproduced.COR-023_subset: The team aggregate contract was correctly absent, but no stable blocked region explained that absence while preserving valid individual regions.
defects_reproduced.url_and_focus: Semantically invalid detail rounds were removed rather than canonicalized to the resolved policy result, and correction focus remained on the route title rather than the visible round result region.

root_cause_investigation.mapper: CompetitionRoundsEnvelopeSchema accepted roundfinish as unknown but mapCompetitionRounds ignored it, forced status to an empty string, duplicated cur_round onto every item, and required cur_round to be non-null even though production returns null before an authoritative current round exists.
root_cause_investigation.views: Both views implemented local fallback logic against sourceCurrentRoundId and collection endpoints instead of consuming a normalized lifecycle. CompetitionDetailView also passed its computed default into the display link, preventing the display route from owning its distinct default policy.
root_cause_investigation.team: CompetitionDetailSchema already read generic type and ext_catgory but omitted the production ext_type event-format field. Without a typed event-format projection, the UI could not identify a verified team event without prohibited title or row-shape guessing.
root_cause_investigation.hypothesis: Map nullable source lifecycle markers and ext_type once at the repository boundary, then make each route consume a small framework-free policy with explicit URL priority. This removes raw source interpretation from Vue components while keeping missing evidence unknown and contract-blocked team content truthful.

real_payload_and_lifecycle_evidence.transport: Real anonymous responses were observed through the fixed development proxy for GetActList, GetActDetail, GetActGroups, GetMatchRoundlist, and GetMatchPairlist; no credentials, cookies, protected requests, or complete sensitive payloads were retained in this report.

individual_distinct_policy_event.round_markers: cur_round=1, roundfinish=null, numeric round IDs 0 through 10
individual_distinct_policy_event.projection: round 0 completed, round 1 ongoing, rounds 2 through 10 upcoming
individual_distinct_policy_event.observed_defaults: detail/commentary selected round 0; display selected round 1

completed_event.round_markers: cur_round=2, roundfinish=2, numeric round IDs 0 through 2
completed_event.projection: all three rounds completed; latest completed is round 2

unknown_event.round_markers: cur_round=null, roundfinish=null, numeric round IDs 0 through 7
unknown_event.projection: all rounds unknown because neither current nor completed source evidence exists; both policies use the final first-valid fallback without promoting lifecycle

real_payload_and_lifecycle_evidence.team_field_conclusion: The two verified team events have different generic type values but the same ext_type=1, while verified individual events use ext_type=0. The mapper therefore uses only ext_type for CompetitionEventType and never title text, ext_catgory, group names, pairing counts, or results.
real_payload_and_lifecycle_evidence.source_semantics: The two read-only Web authorities compare numeric round_id values with cur_round to label lower rounds completed, the exact current round current, and higher rounds not started. Production roundfinish is a nullable completion high-water marker and overrides an equal cur_round on completed events.
real_payload_and_lifecycle_evidence.unknown_rule: Exact finished/current identifier equality is usable for nonnumeric identifiers; ordered lifecycle requires nonnegative safe-integer source identifiers. Missing, empty, non-comparable, or unsupported evidence remains unknown. Client time, names, source array position, current UI selection, and pairing status are never used.

implementation.surface: CD-001/CD-002 competition detail and current public pairing-card venue display selection only
implementation.classification: CURRENT_IMPLEMENTED plus truthful CONTRACT_BLOCKED team aggregate region
implementation.scope: MISSING-UI-015, NONCONF-UI-022, COR-005, and only the blocked-region subset of COR-023
implementation.round_lifecycle_owner: src/api/productMappers.ts maps CompetitionRound.lifecycle as completed, ongoing, upcoming, or unknown
implementation.policy_owner: src/features/product-api/domain/competitionRoundPolicy.ts exports separate selectCommentaryRound and selectDisplayRound functions without Vue, Router, Query, persistence, or transport dependencies
implementation.team_owner: CompetitionDetail.eventType is mapped from ext_type; CompetitionDetailView consumes the existing team_aggregates capability projection

commentary_round_policy: explicit URL round when it belongs to the selected group
latest completed round in source order
nearest source-confirmed upcoming round in source order
display_round_policy: explicit URL round when it belongs to the selected group
nearest source-confirmed upcoming round in source order
latest completed round in source order

url_focus_and_handoff_contract.detail_missing_round: Resolved in memory for commentary and pairings but omitted from the display link, allowing display to execute its own policy.
url_focus_and_handoff_contract.display_missing_round: Resolved by the display policy and canonicalized with router.replace together with the valid group.
url_focus_and_handoff_contract.invalid_round: Resolved by the route-specific policy, canonicalized with router.replace, clears stale page/focus state where applicable, and reaches a stable URL without a navigation loop.
url_focus_and_handoff_contract.explicit_round: Preserved on detail, display entry, display refresh, browser back, and browser forward.
url_focus_and_handoff_contract.manual_selection: Uses router.push so selection history remains traversable.
url_focus_and_handoff_contract.focus: An invalid correction or user-triggered policy selection focuses the visible pairing result region or display stage. A valid explicit route and ordinary background refresh do not steal focus.
url_focus_and_handoff_contract.commentary_handoff: The no-round 50624 handoff was readonly competition_commentary with competitionId 50624 and policy-selected roundId 0.
url_focus_and_handoff_contract.display_entry: The same no-round detail link omitted round and display independently canonicalized roundId 1.

team_blocked_region_contract.condition: Render exactly once only when mapped CompetitionDetail.eventType is team.
team_blocked_region_contract.copy: State that the real read contract is unconfirmed and that team aggregate success content will not be displayed or computed.
team_blocked_region_contract.preserved_regions: Real event summary, group, round, pairing, resource states, and existing safe actions remain available.
team_blocked_region_contract.forbidden_content: No team total, standings, board order, match points, tie-break, ranking, success DTO, fallback, or sample data is created.
team_blocked_region_contract.actions: No retry without a request and no login before contract confirmation.
team_blocked_region_contract.network: The region evaluates the existing team_aggregates contract-blocked projection and issues no request.

static_validation.result: pass; temporary output verified and removed

browser_validation.individual: 50624 rendered detail round 0 without a round query, rendered no team region, created a readonly commentary handoff for round 0, and linked to display without a round query; display independently canonicalized round 1.
browser_validation.explicit_valid: Explicit upcoming round 2 remained selected on detail, display entry, display refresh, browser back, and browser forward.
browser_validation.invalid: Invalid detail round canonicalized to round 0 and focused the pairing result region; invalid display round canonicalized to round 1 and focused the display stage; no loop occurred.
browser_validation.completed_ongoing_upcoming_unknown: 50624 exercised completed round 0, ongoing round 1, and explicit upcoming round 2; 46744 confirmed completed high-water behavior; 50457 accepted nullable markers, preserved unknown lifecycle, and used first valid round 0 without guessing.
browser_validation.team: Verified team events 33475 and 23347 each rendered exactly one blocked region with zero retry/login actions while retaining event summary, controls, round region, and real pairings behavior. Verified individual 50624 rendered zero team regions.
browser_validation.no_synthesized_team_success: The team region contained only the contract-blocked explanation and no aggregate table, score, standings, ranking, board-order, tie-break, or success action.
browser_validation.retained_refresh: A delayed real GetMatchPairlist refetch retained all three display cards, showed 正在更新, and preserved focus on 暂停轮换.
browser_validation.partial_failure: A manual transport abort with no replacement response exercised the existing retry path twice; all three last-trusted cards remained, 部分内容未完成 appeared, focus stayed put, and a subsequent real refetch recovered with zero partial-failure banners and zero page errors.
browser_validation.responsive: At 1440x900, detail used desktop controls/table and hid narrow composition; at 390x844 it used mobile summary/narrow list and hid desktop composition. Team region remained exactly once, display retained three cards, and both routes had no horizontal document overflow.
browser_validation.theme: The same route resolved distinct governed light and dark token colors, then restored the original system preference.
browser_validation.focus_and_keyboard: Route title focus remained for ordinary valid/missing detail entry; invalid correction moved focus to the visible result region; manual round selectors remain keyboard-focusable; background retained refresh did not move focus.
browser_validation.runtime_health: Final clean-page DOM was nonblank, Vite overlay count was zero, console-breaking error count was zero, and page-error count was zero.
browser_validation.artifacts: No screenshots, browser scripts, snapshots, fixtures, mocks, test files, or browser artifacts were created or retained in the repository.

cor_impact.MISSING-UI-015: implemented as a stable truthful team-aggregate blocked region backed by authoritative mapped event format
cor_impact.NONCONF-UI-022: implemented with normalized repository-owned lifecycle and separate framework-free policies
cor_impact.COR-005: the named implementation gap is no longer reproducible; detail and display independently resolve their approved policy and preserve explicit URL state
cor_impact.COR-023: only the truthful blocked-region subset is implemented; aggregate success remains OPEN_CONTRACT_BLOCKED
cor_impact.OD-01_to_OD-11: all remain open and unchanged; no provisional value was promoted

remaining_risks: Team aggregate data remains unavailable until a real DTO/repository contract is confirmed; this slice intentionally adds no success shape or request.
Events with null or non-comparable lifecycle markers remain unknown and use only the first-valid terminal fallback; client time and names will not fill that gap.

The DEV-SLICE-010 task packet requires display ongoing then nearest-upcoming priority, while the current venue page authority still documents ongoing then latest-completed; this implementation follows the higher-priority explicit task without modifying authority documents.
Production cross-origin browser transport remains outside this local development validation and retains the existing deployment-boundary limitation.
No automated tests exist or were added because repository policy forbids automated test infrastructure; validation uses static checks and narrow real-browser evidence.

review.result: Targeted full-diff, mapper-boundary, URL-loop, focus, contract-truthfulness, responsive, and runtime reviews completed with no remaining actionable slice-local finding.
review.addressed: nullable cur_round contract mismatch, incorrect generic type team detection, source-current/latest local fallbacks, display inheritance of commentary default, invalid URL deletion without canonical result, focus theft risk during background refresh, and stylelint selector order

commit_subject: fix(competition): 分离讲解与展示轮次策略并完善团体阻断区
